description: secretx-file/src/lib.rs:48-70 only rejects empty path and '..' components. URIs like 'secretx:file:/' or 'secretx:file:foo/' parse successfully. PathBuf::from('/').file_name() returns None, so write_secret_file at lib.rs:150-152 returns InvalidInput wrapped in SecretError::Backend at runtime on first put(), not at construction. This breaks the documented contract that from_uri 'does not read the file — construction only' but validates the URI. Fix: add path.file_name().is_some() check in from_uri returning SecretError::InvalidUri.
title: [bug] from_uri accepts path with no file_name; put() then errors at runtime instead of construction
